what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-2 in the design-source channel, providing an id, address, blob reference, MIME type, source tag, author session, creation timestamp, empty links list, and a short human-readable source label.
observations: YAML frontmatter with image metadata fields
address uses the image://design-source/vt-architects/p-2 URI scheme
body text reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — vt-architects/p-2.jpg'
standouts: The image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being a JPEG
It is explicitly labeled as a design ground-truth source
It contains a blob reference but no links to other ledger entries
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Uses URI schemes for the asset address and blob reference
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
concerns: Width and height are zero, which is unusual for an image record
No alt text, caption, or descriptive content for the image
No explicit provenance beyond an opaque author_session identifier
links array is empty, leaving the asset isolated in the ledger
notes: A sparse metadata stub for a design-source JPEG image with unresolved dimensions and no outgoing relationships.
questions: Why are the width and height values 0?
Is the blob reference resolvable and does it match the named .jpg file?
What is meant by 'design ground-truth' in this context?
Is there a separate actual image file stored elsewhere?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record source design ground-truth for an image; actual content is a minimal metadata record that provides identifiers and a blob pointer but lacks expected image details such as real dimensions, description, or relationships.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a design-source image asset in the channel-memory ledger so it can be located, attributed to an authoring session, and referenced by a stable blob pointer.
contribution: It contributes a persistent identifier, address, blob pointer, MIME type, authorship marker, and creation timestamp for an image asset, which a fused system can use to locate, attribute, and correlate the image with other records.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for a JPEG image named vt-architects/p-2 in the design-source channel, referencing a blob and an author session while recording zero width/height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and provide ground-truth provenance for a design-source image asset within the company channel-memory ledger.
